usedAccount: This service account is already in use
usedEmail: This email is already in use
pseudonymSub: Your username will be visible by the administrators of the calendars where you will contribute events
emailSub: OpenAgenda will send your notifications to this address. It will not be passed on to any third party.

socialHead: Create an account using Facebook, Twitter or Google
socialDescription: Your OpenAgenda account will be linked to the chosen account. Authentication will be done through that social network.
